imagegen_reference_only.purpose: Non-evidence layout reference for a three-band GRScenes diagnostic case atlas.

evidence: The final atlas uses clean-rerender GRScenes target-view original and converted render pairs.
The target boxes and center markers remain visible for bottle, cup, backpack, and clock cases.
The three bands map the visual anchors to Table S4, Table S5, and Table S6 without introducing a new benchmark claim.
No large red fallback-material artifact is visible in the source figure or rendered PDF page.
risks: The atlas reuses the clean-rerender case pool rather than covering every row in the failure taxonomy.
The adjacent Table S4-S6 pages remain table-heavy and are still candidates for later reflow.
This is a local visual review, not an independent fork-context review.

verification_commands: pdftotext paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.pdf - | rg -n "GRScenes diagnostic case atlas|Red material|registered diagnostic figure|fig_vlm_grounding_cases|/cpfs|zhuzihou|jandan138|github.com|ConvertAsset.git" -S
